items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CE New Mini16 Shoulder Bag
The 16 series has a new model again. This time, unlike the previous plain leather, it uses durable grainy leather, showing more texture. Despite being small, the capacity is impressive; it fits two phones easily. Can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, with an adjustable strap. Lightweight!!
Style: Versatile item
Capacity: Among mini bags, the capacity is top-tier, very spacious
Model: 10m443
Color: Tan Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18×12×3.5cm

Genuine Grade
CELIN.E 23 New Ava TRIOMPHE Calfskin Handbag
This time Ava adds a metal Triomphe logo buckle, making it more exquisite and beautiful 💓~ Soft calfskin and crescent moon appearance 🌙 Full texture, comes with retro fashion sense. Magnetic C-closure Triomphe flap design, interpreting French retro romance. The whole bag is lightweight yet structured 💯 Daily versatile and commuter ready ✨
